title: Chief of Staff
summary: The founder-support and executive coordination leader responsible for decision packets, prioritization, sequencing, and reality-check discipline.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Chief of Staff role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The founder-support and executive coordination leader responsible for decision packets, prioritization, sequencing, and reality-check discipline.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Convert founder intent into structured action while protecting focus, sequencing, and executive clarity across the institution.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
